metadata.title: Agitated Tanks and Mixers | Welltech®
metadata.description: Stainless steel agitated mixer tanks suitable for different viscosities for the food, pharmaceutical, and chemical industries.

hero.title: Agitated Tanks
hero.desc: Product and process-specific industrial mixers that flawlessly combine liquid-liquid or liquid-solid mixtures of varying viscosities.

technology.title: Fluid Mechanics and Agitator Technology
technology.desc: The efficiency of agitated tanks depends on the Agitator (Blade) design, which is selected according to the viscosity and density of the product to be mixed. While Propeller type blades create rapid circulation in low-viscosity liquids; Anchor and Scraper blades provide a homogeneous mixture by preventing high-viscosity and sticky products from clinging to the tank wall. By integrating baffles inside the tank when necessary, vortex formation is prevented, minimizing mixing time.

features.title: Design and Performance Advantages
items: Agitator Blade Design Custom Selected for Liquid and Viscosity
Baffle System to Prevent Vortex Formation
Preventing Product Burn and Wall Adhesion with Teflon Scrapers
Ability to Operate at Different Speeds with Inverter (Speed Controller)
Special Gearbox and Motor Configuration that Preserves Product Form
Integrated CIP (Clean-in-Place) Wash Balls for Easy Cleaning

table.title: Blade Types and Application Areas
table.note: * The listed rotational speeds and viscosity values are general references; the motor/gearbox combination is calculated specifically for your project.

items.a: In fast mixing processes, it prevents the liquid from swirling inside the tank and forming a vortex. The baffle disrupts the flow direction of the liquid, allowing it to mix vertically and reducing processing time by up to 40%.

items.q: Why is a scraper agitator preferred?
items.a: Especially in heated jacketed tanks, Teflon scraper blades are mandatory to prevent dense fluids (such as tomato paste or cosmetic creams) from sticking to the heated wall and burning or caramelizing.

reference.desc: Liquid soap mixer line with Teflon scrapers and heating jacket we installed for a global cosmetics company.

cta.title: What is Your Product's Viscosity?
cta.desc: Inform us about the density (viscosity) of your fluid and your capacity, and let's design the most accurate vortex-free motor-gearbox and blade (agitator) system together.
